{"id":"smallhold-4rg","title":"WebFinger: parse acct URI, validate domain, return JRD","description":"Implement /.well-known/webfinger. Parse resource= query param as acct:username@domain. Validate domain exactly matches config.server.domain. Look up username in accounts table. Return JRD with correct subject, aliases, and links.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to fetch a real WebFinger response from mastodon.social and document the exact JSON structure. Spawn a testing subagent to write conformance tests against that structure.

Test discipline:
- Capture live response: curl 'https://mastodon.social/.well-known/webfinger?resource=acct:Gargron@mastodon.social' — use this as the oracle for expected structure
- Test: correct resource returns correct JRD with all required link relations
- Test: wrong domain in acct returns 404 (not 400 — Mastodon returns 404)
- Test: unknown username returns 404
- Test: missing resource param returns 400
- Test: resource without @ returns 404

Defensive programming:
- URL-decode the resource parameter before parsing (some clients encode the colon)
- Case-insensitive username matching (Mastodon does case-insensitive lookup)
- Content-Type: application/jrd+json (NOT application/json)","design":"ostatus subscribe link template: https://{domain}/authorize_interaction?uri={uri}","acceptance_criteria":"Response structure matches mastodon.social's JRD format exactly; wrong domain returns 404; unknown user returns 404; Content-Type is application/jrd+json","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:10Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:28:10Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4uc","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:28:30Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
